plugin-stopwatch.name: Timer / Stopwatch
plugin-stopwatch.description: Compact timer and stopwatch with smooth circular progress, editable timer duration, and optional sound.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Show the timer and stopwatch card for matching queries.

stopwatchCycle.label: Stopwatch ring cycle
stopwatchCycle.description: Seconds per stopwatch progress ring. A short tick plays each time a ring completes.

alarmTone.label: Timer alarm tone
alarmTone.description: Tone when a timer reaches zero (not stopwatch). Add .m4a or .mp3 files to the plugin sounds/ folder.
